summary: tell me where to find a schema file

prompt.text: tell me where to find a schema file

response.text:
I haven’t scanned the repo beyond `schemas/cursor.md`, so I can’t point to a specific unified event schema file yet. Typical places to check (read-only) in this repo:

- `schemas/` (if more markdown schemas live there)
- `src/session.rs` (often defines event/session payloads)
- `src/daemon.rs` (where `send_event` is defined/used)
- `src/events.rs` or `src/event.rs` (if present)

If you want an exact path, tell me which of those is present or let me read the repo tree and I’ll point to the precise schema file.
